sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal; [“kindred to אָמַן”].

Hiphil הֵימִין and הֵמִין 2Sa 14:19, denom. from יָמִין.

(1) to go to the right, to turn to the right. Gen 13:9 Eze 21:21. Comp. אָמַן No. II.

(2) to use the right hand. Part. מַיְמִינִים 1Ch 12:2.

Derived or cognate nouns, יָמִין, יְמִינִי No. 1, תֵּימָן and-
